overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along the Del Perro Pier. The player approaches the twin cafe buildings at the pier's end, briefly views the open ocean and coastline, encounters NPCs conversing near the cafe, and explores the side deck passing a boat lift.

approaching the white gates at the end of the pier

green wooden benches along the pier

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along the wooden planks of Del Perro Pier. The player passes green benches and trash cans while approaching the twin cafe buildings at the pier's end. A woman stands by the right railing looking out at a distant sailboat on the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: passage between the two pier buildings

events.description: passing through the white gates between the two cafe buildings
turning left to look out at the open ocean
view shifts to reveal the coastline and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: passing through the gate between buildings and turning to view the ocean and coastline

entered.detail: white wooden gates marking the entrance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the white gates between the twin cafe buildings, entering a more enclosed space. The camera turns left to reveal the open ocean, then pans further to show the distant mountain coastline before turning back toward the pier structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: side deck of the pier with cafe entrance

woman in white vest and floral skirt talking to the man

entered.detail: black sign with 'Cafe' text on the building
metal staircase leading to upper deck
white ring life preserver mounted on railing

segments.scene_description: Returning to the cafe area, the player encounters a man and woman conversing near the cafe entrance. The player then walks along the side deck, passing external stairs and life preservers mounted on the railings, with the ocean visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: side deck with boat lift and coastal view

events.description: approaching a large boat suspended on a hydraulic lift
view opens to show the beach, shore buildings, and mountains

agents.ego_description: walking past the boat lift and admiring the view of the coastline and mountains

entered.detail: red metal hydraulic lift structure holding a blue and white boat
blue hull boat suspended above the water on the lift
sandy beach with buildings along the coastline
large cylindrical pipes stacked on the deck

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the side deck past metal pipes and approaches a large boat suspended on a red hydraulic lift. The view opens to reveal the sandy beach, shore buildings, and mountains in the distance as the player continues along the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along the wooden planks of Del Perro Pier that transitions from a crowded boardwalk into a more industrial side deck overlooking the coast. It begins by passing green benches and trash cans toward twin cafe buildings, while a woman stands by the railing observing a distant sailboat. As the camera moves through white gates into an enclosed space, the view opens to reveal the vast ocean and the distant mountain coastline before turning back toward the cafe entrance. The scene then shifts as the player passes a conversing couple and follows the side deck past external stairs and life preservers. Finally, the camera glides past metal pipes and a large boat suspended on a red hydraulic lift, opening up to a wide vista of the sandy beach and shore buildings beneath the distant mountains.
